scope: Authored Blender viewport appearance only. The evaluated drawer has no assigned material, filament shader, slicer data, or G-code toolpath.

wireHelpers.authoredCapture: Hidden because the loose String-to-Curves dimension annotation has no evaluated mesh faces and Blender Eevee does not render it; retained in the interactive browser view.

capture.lightScaleInterpretation: Blender Area-light energy and Three.js RectAreaLight intensity use different units and scale differently with emitter area. The browser scale and fill balance were swept independently to align mean exposure and preserve more of Blender's face-to-face luminance ordering.

interpretation: The open drawer's evaluated geometry, flat-face contract, neutral unassigned surface, and framing match Blender closely. The remaining local luminance error is the measured Eevee-versus-WebGL area-light, shadow, and double-sided response; no material nodes or modeled print layers are missing.
